title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to OpsPal's skill detection capabilities, now cataloging 683 skills across 25 categories to better understand your team's expertise. We also enhanced Salesforce deployment reliability with better error recovery and fixed critical issues that were preventing HubSpot integrations from launching properly.

entries.headline: Expanded skill catalog now tracks 683 skills across 25 categories
Enhanced data import reliability and workflow documentation
Salesforce deployments now recover automatically from errors
Plugin names now display consistently across the platform
Restored missing historical data from previous weeks
Better Salesforce field validation and deployment protection
details: Now detects State/Country picklist configurations that could cause deployment issues
Improved validation checks run before making changes to your Salesforce org

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments now run more reliably
Resolved HubSpot connection issues preventing automation launches
